title: How to Use NanoClaw (Better Than OpenClaw?)
summary: NanoClaw is a lightweight, AI-native alternative to OpenClaw designed for building agent swarms and automation pipelines. The framework runs agents in ephemeral Docker containers, coordinates through Telegram bots, and can be customized by Claude Code without extensive manual coding of large codebases.
